experiment: M5 dead-reckoning LLM readout (frozen Qwen2.5-1.5B + LoRA + fusion reads the emergent HD+grid code)
organ_specificity: double dissociation: WHERE collapses only when grid is ablated (8% vs 39%); FACING collapses only when HD is ablated (10% vs 33%) -- each LLM read traces to its own emergent organ.
honest_notes: WHERE ON>>OFF is significant (p=0.033; all 6 seeds ON>OFF).
FACING ON>>OFF is a strong trend (delta +28%) but not significant at n=6 (p=0.095); the organ-specific lesion (no-HD 10% vs no-grid 33%) independently confirms FACING reads the HD code.
Wide cross-seed CIs reflect readout-convergence magnitude variance, not direction (direction is consistent).
The harder egocentric HOMING-VECTOR readout (a nonlinear cross-organ combination atan2(-position) - heading) was NULL in the first run and is left as documented future work.
